escalation.rationale: Yemen Houthis launched first missile at Israel while US casualties in Iran war reached 15, expanding regional conflict scope.

ticker_items: Houthis fire first ballistic missile at Israel from Yemen
15 US soldiers injured in Iranian IRGC attack on Saudi base
Israeli strikes hit Iranian nuclear reactor at Khondab
Russia launches spring offensive with 400 drone assault on Ukraine
Oil hits $100/barrel as Strait of Hormuz remains closed

new_entrant.text: Yemen's Houthis entered the Iran-Israel conflict by launching their first ballistic missile attack targeting Israeli military sites.

eastern_europe.description: Continued spring offensive operations with increased assault frequency along entire frontline.
Drone strike damages Project 23550 Arctic patrol ship Purga under construction.

middle_east.description: Ballistic missile barrage targeting sensitive Israeli military sites, first Houthi attack on Israel.
Ballistic missiles and drones targeted six US tactical vessels and base facilities.
Airstrikes hit Iranian heavy water nuclear reactor with no reported radiation leak.
Air strikes targeted sites belonging to Iraq's Popular Mobilisation Forces.

today.incident: Iranian IRGC attack on US base Saudi Arabia
US-Israeli strike on Iran toddler rescue

ukraine.text: Kyiv faces a deficit of missiles as Washington is focused on its war on Iran
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
ukraine.title: President of Ukraine

middle_east.text: We launched ballistic missiles at Israel, we will continue until the attacks stop
middle_east.speaker: Houthis spokesperson
middle_east.title: Yemen Houthis

middle_east.text: We are negotiating, but the Strait of Hormuz must be opened
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: Iran [is a] lunatic nation [that has been] militarily decimated
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: Chancellor Merz stated the US-Israeli war against Iran is unlikely to achieve regime change. Germany increased defense spending to 2.4% of GDP in 2025 amid rising global tensions.
President Lukashenko signed a new treaty on friendship and cooperation with North Korea's Kim Jong-un in Pyongyang. Belarus announced plans to open an embassy in North Korea following the talks.

Manitoba Premier Wab Kinew called the Iran conflict 'a dumb war' and urged Prime Minister Mark Carney to take action. Canadian Army is preparing major reorganization amid finalizing mobilization plans.

financial.notes: Oil prices hit $100 per barrel amid Iran war and closed Strait of Hormuz, providing Russia unexpected budget windfall.

update_log.text: Yemen Houthis launch first ballistic missile attack targeting Israeli military sites in southern Israel
US casualties in Iranian IRGC attack on Saudi base rise to 15 injured soldiers
Israeli airstrikes hit Iranian heavy water nuclear reactor at Khondab with no radiation leak reported
Air strikes target Popular Mobilisation Forces sites in Mosul, Iraq with thick smoke rising
Rescue teams save toddler from destroyed building after US-Israeli strike on Iran
